name: Li-Cycle Holdings Corp.
description: Li-Cycle Holdings Corp. is a leading global lithium-ion battery resource recovery company and the largest pure-play lithium-ion battery recycler in North America. The company utilizes its innovative and proprietary Spoke & Hub Technologies™ to provide a safe, scalable, and sustainable solution for recycling all types of lithium-ion batteries. Li-Cycle recovers critical battery-grade materials, including lithium, cobalt, and nickel, from manufacturing scrap and end-of-life batteries, returning them to the battery supply chain to support the transition to a circular economy and global electrification.
